## Checklist

- [ ] **Breaking changes?** Yes / No / N/A (if yes, describe in notes or docs)
- [ ] **Documentation updated** (README, docs/, or `.neptune.example.yaml` as needed)
- [ ] **Tests added or updated** (`make test-all` passes)

## AI Summary

<!-- Summary for AI reviewers. Fill in or let an AI generate this so agents can quickly assess scope and focus review. -->

- **Scope:** <!-- e.g. lambda (config, webhooks, main, cloudformation), docs, AGENTS.md -->
- **Type:** <!-- e.g. feat, fix, docs, refactor -->
- **Key files/areas:** <!-- e.g. lambda/pkg/config/config.go, lambda/main.go, docs/github-app-and-lambda.md -->
